retry_reason: The decrement always occurs; failure indicates a use-after-free bug, not a transient condition. Retry is meaningless.
contract_summary: Standard put-wrapper: decrements the reference count on a cachefiles_req object. If the reference count reaches zero, the object is freed via kfree. After calling cachefiles_req_put, the caller must not access the object, as it may have been freed. This function does not require any locks; the caller is responsible for ensuring that the object is not used concurrently.
